egg_research.title: Perform the Dragon Egg Research ritual (End's Delight) — examine the egg to unlock the full recipe tree

dragon_breath_cook.title: Use Dragon Breath as a cooking ingredient in an End's Delight recipe

subtitle.text: The egg does not hatch. It teaches. One interaction unlocks everything the dragon knew about food.

description: CH.14 · DRAGON EGG RESEARCH
▸ The Dragon Egg Research mechanic is End's Delight's
primary unlock system.
The egg is not food. It is not decoration.
It is the research trigger for the entire dragon food tree.
One interaction. Full unlock.
Do not place it. Do not smelt it.
Use it as a research item exactly once.
◈ HOW DRAGON EGG RESEARCH WORKS
└ Hold the Dragon Egg and interact with the research station
(End's Delight specific mechanic — check JEI or mod guide)
└ Alternative: the egg may function as a crafting ingredient
that is returned after use (consumed: no; catalyst: yes)
└ What it unlocks: all dragon-tier cooking recipes
— Dragon Meat preparations, Dragon Breath dishes,
— End Stone soup bases, Chorus-infused cooking
└ The egg remains in your inventory after research
(do not lose it — it is a display item for Ch15+)
◈ DRAGON BREATH IN COOKING
└ Dragon Breath (minecraft:dragon_breath) = glass bottle + cloud
└ End's Delight uses it as a flavor catalyst in recipes
similar to how fire charge is used in Nether cooking mods
└ Collect via: right-click breath cloud during Dragon fight
└ Stack: 64 per session minimum for full recipe coverage
└ Pipeline: re-summon Dragon → batch collect Dragon Breath
→ cook End's Delight recipes → repeat as needed
◈ WHY THE EGG DOES NOT HATCH
└ In-lore: no civilization ever figured out the hatch condition
└ Ch12's PTD scroll mentions the egg in Philosopher's Stone context
└ End's Delight interpretation: the egg stores accumulated
knowledge of the dragon — research = reading that knowledge
└ The Dragon Egg Research mechanic is the mod's answer
to what the egg is for. It is a library.
▸ Every civilization kept the egg.
None of them hatched it.
They put it in their most protected room
and studied it.
What they learned from studying it
was different for each civilization.
You are going to use it to learn recipes.
That is not the worst use.
▶ Perform Dragon Egg Research (End's Delight) [check]
▶ Use Dragon Breath as a cooking ingredient [check]
◇ After Dragon Egg Research: check JEI under ends_delight:
for the full unlocked recipe tree.
Many recipes require both Dragon Breath AND Popped Chorus.
Your Ch13 Chorus farm is the long-term supply for both.
